headline: How The Evolving Investment Story Could Reshape United Airlines Holdings (UAL) Fair Value
summary: Analysts now peg fair value for United Airlines Holdings at about US$130.17 per share, compared with roughly US$132.67 previously, reflecting a relatively modest shift in the formal price target. The adjustment lines up with a mixed research tone, where confidence in premium demand and revenue quality is balanced against concerns around fuel costs, capacity, and the risk of guidance changes. Read on to see what is driving this evolving narrative and how you can keep track of the key moving...
